message.subject: New Notification for Gemini 3 Paris Hackathon
message.plain_text_body:
New Event Blast

There's a new blast for Gemini 3 Paris Hackathon:

Hey hackers! Unfortunately, Replit is facing some issues with credits. The Replit team is working to resolve this, however credits at this time cannot be redeemed.

View Event https://cerebralvalley.ai/e/gemini-3-paris-hackathon?utm_source=event-blast&utm_medium=email

----------------------------------------

Gemini 3 Paris Hackathon

Dates

Saturday Mar 14 9:00 AM - Saturday Mar 14 10:00 PM (CET)



Add to your calendar:

Google Calendar https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=Gemini%203%20Paris%20Hackathon&dates=20260314T090000%2F20260314T220000&ctz=Europe%2FBelgrade

----------------------------------------

<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3kDW7gRLvN7n5VDHN6SJ-kWqF-ZMW3_qJ1p2d74hvW5k7zVk52mx7NW84bdTz63yQ-xW8t2kSM7JXgjYN7Tn18LkH_16W2SQsSQ23Sh95W3fql1-74V6xpW446tsz4lGDBLW5V8Z5v3b817VW2Svr0280CrRzVd3XLP7-SPKXW1sNCH74FkwVGN4--MMlmSz0vVTn8sg2L0_7QW7z94cD6RV_QHW5JKq9v7TQR9FW3Wq5Nm3GlWwbW2lM8dR411S_JW8l7LLS87DWgtW374QtC7DwrsxW5KlYsy4bPXGBW66y1HZ8Yk5mWW3rhTJR7Nyw1nW9gvx2D75hdqFW78rpDw76T_4sW1RTJjF8Tl9RBW8MXWJF7FkX7kW41zCF-6Tp50Ff7PBkyq04" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="cqUI4wwN">Timeless Algorithms: The Seminal Papers</a></span></p>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">This book explores the breakthrough algorithms that power modern AI—including Bayes’ prior and posterior beliefs, Fisher’s estimation and likelihood, Shannon’s information gain, and Breiman’s algorithmic modeling. With clarity and rigor, statistics expert <span style="font-weight: bold;">Gary Sutton</span> unpacks each concept and explains its practical relevance. [<a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3mJW6HGtLk2vR4hGW4TkR2M1GPgfQVxxXBz10zbxhVmVWtH2PQYWzW8s28cZ1L8nYcW3QQFCd2SCJRpW2zqv021QGsF0W6j578N5PgR-sW6F1Dbm3-gSCSW8qhyp64H-l5vW3c7yfq3SDBr1W1z0_Pw9fQ-wHV-DrT45x_PWQW7shVG18Nw38LN7BCB6k3hxy5N8VWpycDnmQ1W7gQ6SN1b2XD2W8gq0th6FbKVXW1g4Dm12B6bPDW47dfjk9499dvW6nvWdb3bnqnhW6FLPvb28qj54W4qfvb74P14dBW5b0YGn9bY0ptW3kFCX81NpSr8W5tJ00T8zNM0zW3VTVQG7FVKgXW8Rp4Y74Yhqv0W561l9D3XwCD1W3RTCmR3GbT98f2f3m8d04" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="+14h60Uu">Read more</a>]</span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><em>8 chapters of this new MEAP are available now, with more to follow soon!</em></span></p>

  <div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_17733240282159" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_17733240282159_" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><div style="font-size:16px; line-height:150%">
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3l4W47PBDy5wzH34VqdK5p73Xh4wVZ2QtT4RTHh_W38CG1g7LcsXWW5pym0j2wHqnKW4t3KdP4v71K5Vx1Ckf8ZgGzVW2BtX5s2bmcxqW5-3YsJ7XsqWqN6p19W1tM59LW6KZZrL1jv7YGW1Czhtv7pH9Y-W2GbHKG7Hr1MNN1KQFjbNZZy5LVD4x7pzz6TSMBS52p39jVvLDJt2xPtQNW213-YW51qDb7Vc-wC772KD8GW2lcBbc4-VGLjW1jK_N45d03JfW635Vnt2ws9nYW2_gMHM51rXPmW5kQXnL2KvNjvW1MPb5y2_YbK0W2gkZRn8mYwcLf60RGlM04" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="Z8yvzAhp">The RLHF Book</a></span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #cccccc;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3ncW4vZ7cL5423gxW1GbS6B3xVdBYM-XgGqJYkfmW8-XWr54GjC68W8Lrldd2BS3JcV-878d50lgSzW8MJ7nZ8S95rzW1ZbnP13qXllJN2Zmst3xcYjdW2LjNV54Bsx75W3yZx9453jhr2W24Cg7L60-LB5N1J2vFgLbsnhW5n-_qQ3nr2WbW4dHm6b7LrmxsW8Jtrjw3L5QFvW433RSr1rxzlXVV-_RS8ZFDjFW7y_HvL7kNyYMW6YkXqn5C9VtcW40vrn65ZhW6wW81P2fb6h-X9WW1tcSqy47F-6HW8-j7jK8FnWTLN5y1XZJntpysW7ldGkK4TS-B8f6Vh2H804" style="text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold; color:#cccccc" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="zYRVo3af" target="_blank">Reinforcement learning from human feedback, alignment, and post-training LLMs</a></span></span></p>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">AI expert <span style="font-weight: bold;">Nathan Lambert</span> gives a true industry insider's perspective on modern RLHF training pipelines, and their trade-offs. <div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3lDW6HZ9SN5qbrKTW2y8QRz9bxQDVVMQQ593T8YBfN5XMRNVC25BYW7jXM6C1V5T1RN6RRjgSmsmQRW1cmfQx7TRgdsW6Vxky-3wnL5VW8Yzrrx2Nz2D0W2p2zjb4XbcnsW7109BD30MhwRW94sLVj590X04N4zTnlgQg5dbW9894f21Pd6ZXW4dZ2V33D7DDNW8L1dl_648XplN7RPR87S8Pp4W80x4gl20rn4QW5__dGV5kfZW4W77S8Kk38sy0cW6gmS0k69xdtZW3Vl_9Z23xV9mW7V5_nK45WGmZW60Wq9B32H3CSW4VS0Km17ZD1HW1TV3Lk6LSc-bW5ZJV_c40yQFBN1jVCbnR_0XTW5W0Vq42QSXC2W6cY5j72nHhd_f7djTss04" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="So3XkTIb" target="_blank">Build a Reasoning Model (From Scratch)</a></span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px; font-weight:bold"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">By Sebastian Raschka</span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">Acclaimed ML research engineer Sebastian Raschka takes you inside the black box of reasoning-enhanced LLMs. You’ll start with a compact, pre-trained base model that runs on consumer hardware, then upgrade it step-by-step to tackle ever-more difficult problems and scenarios. [<a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3ldW4Lt73X2GzwcCN5R587NCc4vDW239VtL5QWg5VW6_G-JL76V6pNW37y5dF242vlCW3LQMdv2TZ7RqW19-k4B4K_TL0W6CrmtV1p7dWvW3bh3Dr7tRcrlVPZgsR4dLDQ5W3368M-2t8Q08VpBj7R61SPQJW2Rdvn07L3ZXHW4Fr-tv78QTRQW6_9pB99lF8pkW6T8QMN5PCSmtW8hgPs25gr7qZW5jHT5H61hx4vW4p-cbf3DqDwyW1VYgXd3SXSncVXwrjM2tjcJwW1qZG3s4Pkkw-W7bvbKg8tNrWcW8sQZJd2ttSLKW8bksDL2cWxqwW35w9rb5v9RXhW3BDwlF2KkZF-W4lnB0M7W9TxXW4lZn4J4qnPVcW72Lys344TYqYf6K1cJT04" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="IeXFm6Cc">Read more</a>]</span></p>

<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #cccccc;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3l9W1YLl4x1F8-BxW4MXW8C4tWFC4VcQ75C3ssVTfN1w4XqZhyHgFW4f2sJM73GfXxW23gV2k4Pk4TLW3NKd4h7l2RcTW7GxPHb5jy-1JV4MLb_6cD_bpW6pM_8g2rxLQ0W56nzp734NXYhW11g6BV2KZTjbVh1dds9dtnqDN5f2M0pZcPjGN6zhFPvNQ1CFW57-JKv36xKF9W7N_C8_3kDP9_W77TPR22SlcWcN33_h_wVPFbTV1MYLZ1x43v7N3J94FDK2qRpW6G3fk05L2Qh0W1TKXH157h41BW2Pjxc28vnKlWW7N9zp890m1x-W3b4DFX4B51JsW4T4M8Y517hV_W44lfr17j2fjgW8y8g4d537fbKW3lL01R3tztqYf3qBFtb04" style="text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold; color:#cccccc" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="ZyRKOIFN" target="_blank">Intelligent workflows with LLMs, MCP, A2A, and more</a></span></span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">This totally revised Second Edition by <span style="font-weight: bold;">Micheal Lanham</span> guides you through the latest breakthroughs in large language model (LLM)-powered autonomy, from the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to advanced multi-agent collaboration and deployment. [<a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSyd3qn9qW95jsWP6lZ3pDW1NdJvp1nYqDGW8dK-Qc7WqWd8W4LQzC44mbgnWW67ntvJ1B3dfpW17hzLX4wJ6wrW2-cC0y7GZfVGW3GlsHP2MV5xqVLGhRJ5-R0gKW7mZQvN1glVKHW8q1Y3X3N0xwHW5GW-7X6jkNRlMbNh8FFPnzVW4ZDW1K3_YQSYW1g3Hfk7p3XRJN7cSgS-3JCRxW4tvcC42fQDsTW2KmCW35tR02CW6V8-Fb96pc7PW4tSmFh9bxR6lW4-N1Hf1ZpY-SW5WgDcj3LsrF-W4hM03C4hqdSvW2MF8zH1k0bWwW24Zk329jpZL6W4cDY421kYBzhV8hvRC45NLpwW7Nb7qf7H_HjWW424crG6ymrDPVBxqfr3nhT7_W8rnkyQ3Tfgj9f775MJb04" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none" data-hs-link-id="3" data-hs-link-id-v2="E/cjrFHy">Read more</a>]</span></p>

<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3nfW24hxMw3GhM5WW4DK4ml8WtXVzW4mHk8K5HnXqXW37KT9l1nKYrqW3fXxTd41_0MWN1mZY6X4Pd1wN8-rH3NttnyfW7H5hg642m1mNN3cLFN7rpVJHV6WMs88w5lt3W20MFvl7sbwjnW7Yb0Kv8nbZy5VGg9F27W8W5dW7VZTgt5X5xH3W6JCjsz7PQsVTW8yDYVl5QXKF2W88rDD141xgkJW8tQyBg4hxZSrW7nbGKv4HknTTW6mC7bw7jBB0-W6TdS-B4350jfW5SRDbB1PTMNWN4KsSCBqV9y_VbSNjK49mMg2W41tSjn4NCjDYW85K_dV4HdB1Mf5bCVQl04" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="X6s3z+p0">Vibe Engineering</a></span></p>

<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">Generating code with AI can feel effortless, but it’s only one part of software engineering. A production-grade development pipeline includes testing, validation, refactoring, optimization, and deployment. This book shows you how to go from AI-assisted coding to a AI-infused full-spectrum process author <span style="font-weight: bold;">Tomasz Lelek</span> and <span style="font-weight: bold;">Artur Skowroński </span>call vibe engineering. [<a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pSW7NdTBS75scrRW8gwwcG7vfzZgW3LGK1V40DBQ1W1xNy717J3165VXt-cZ5bXchQVzvGQx8flqMlW6-LWgH5p7X1QW88Z_9W79md3HW4CSVx57Zr1KzW8KKJqS4XDD0BW17XNb44pvzd-W4PbZT-3KtwY3VMQfQS681HvDW6tnxlW6lj5ZKW9gjgGf4W03ysN4m4Rj1tz9sYW1Y8svn9fLq8vVyXhMw6zDbJyV3849c97gzgZW4l4D543hc-JGW8lJfxC3NDsG1W6_p2_f1Z1c72W1mB1sz4xw_zZW6xcqRd3FrZL0W6JKvzG3Gfx-DW6l-RPG57P4VCf8w76ns04" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none" data-hs-link-id="3" data-hs-link-id-v2="H1ilyQVa">Read more</a>]</span></p>

  <div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_177332538986325" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_177332538986325_" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><div style="font-size:16px; line-height:150%">
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3ksW165Gn02HLDFqW1YGWTG4N-Y3DW6y6CP43_jHJnW4LhVsR9jVjBZW3Y8x8-5rjrw6W3_3Wrc5tp5sRW90FHQv5V9WVjW6C-dTy1mPWfmW8ll5Kb1w8JwYW4wZRbn4gQFzkN85-GNRg3RttMn1JcCjtmL8W8ZJ64n6bg3ZnW91Tzbw8spGtrW1gt-jN24KZj2W1T_VCD3kXdv_VDyrZL7TxM0KW4k359C6ckW2vW236ySv2VfSzqW4yxR6m1rSvhzW2WbzjJ7LGVhFW1Y24cd7t5z5pVJNZ-m5hPBcPW6mngZ47yFr75W4h0ZX594CcwRW3xK8mg7HXR57f4v6T6n04" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="Kq5nrGEq">Hidden Influences</a></span></p>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #cccccc;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3lDW7-tp054hKyqmVJ9sG36QYNM-W1wMhh23wt46qW3jZtR299hpVSW2mTLH86zb4tPW6_-5Ss2S2DbJN4qbgvn-wLDSW1NgS2D8YQ7wpW59JXzz3Ws_18W2q-DKN8qT3JZW1Mf_vD5lHprZW8B5f0417mKkxW7nwfHp2ysZN7W1vd1xD6vF7V-W5xnp6y8rJ8CTV8fT0G87xLn2N32Qbq39R4kWW6dPkF436tpHpN2SF07cvyM0lW5b2ql611dQqGW1tkfDb7QSGtgW1HmNZy4hVgdcVD2nmK8RsnLCN30x8Hstml_KW7YlQG47h4bBbW8252jg1C5CjSf18Qxg-04" style="text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold; color:#cccccc" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="bilmDzbw" target="_blank">How algorithmic recommenders shape our lives</a></span></p>
</div>
</div>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: bold;">Dr Luca Belli</span>, co-founder and former research lead for Twitter's Machine Learning Ethics, Transparency and Accountability team, has been on the front lines of how recommender systems work and impact society. In this unique book, he lays out who uses this powerful technology to shape our world, and exactly how they do it. <p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3lYW3dhHsT7rRkGVW218RC57S34ztVSNWsf7vzR93W5VgY_W1jtJvBVJVWSP6Bj_NgW54MFVL5nRGh3W5hKqK13q7vfkW6pKtqx20B1x2W8ZWTTn6WSryYW28J7sq13TPMSW4t1V3w40yJQbW3GCMxz4k3Bx8VtKHPL3GhtncN4Sp7hrnGJ6sW4hTfNg8PBdF1W2TX7Sx7zVV6mW1pg3Cq885WNFW1tsr7f4rv2ctW8pVckJ4fnQmPW1LHKcS36l3XxW5L4Yvj6DX1vhW8KbGql6P3HNwW2hrLM87tnJXjW2D7B8K8MkfkTW7n_Y1T2xXpvbN1VJhyNM94D9f4vhHG604" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="3QxS1Jg+">Vanilla Web</a></span></p>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #cccccc;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pYW6SWZ8g2t1DxPW1LRzch69yD8VN75qns-C_fNfW5VcMVx84B9c4VwjHKY7Yq8H7W54JYts14YRx-W9gQRpg4qwq79W3f0mBY14V72kW6YxXqJ7tq7YnW12XGPD7vFjqjW5L7gLY96xs7PV21L0N4YTTCKW7JFp-w34g31FW3WSWDl5fh_l2W2scjg63QLMvhW7sgPND3wbQ_xW4VYwVC4FWXGqW4VFBLf5R9P1fW3WGg2N8P0WG5W7mt1498PgQPkW7cxKN51gJYBLW4lNDS-3mqVYXW6X1qmT4hwH_PV-Pz0V97yHJjW758hG11tf4c5W3Tb0GS71pgJldmwvKx04" style="text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold; color:#cccccc" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="CfFaMABW" target="_blank">Building apps without frameworks</a></span></p>
</div>
</div>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">When it comes to web development, vanilla may be the finest of the flavors. With plain JavaScript you can build fast, maintainable web apps that run everywhere, load instantly, and avoid framework lock-in. Today’s browsers are incredibly capable, and for many types of applications, “batteries included” libraries and frameworks just introduce avoidable slowdowns, security issues, and complex build chains. Why not embrace the vanilla web! [<a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3kBW967Cn18sWB8xW6kvPYl2q5qN9W1FyxZ96hwX-hW5BxFCL1GXVL-W1zK6b05FcTdqW5kHBTC4FmzrjN8gh-9R6-sKNW5vsx4Q12p4s1W86JqP14QysNhW6Pyxr86rN3QYW4X7ymd7vpR4gW3f1hL83L_l1XW3TKvq94mRr3HW93zp3H2D3vt5W7cPT447xdYy9W270Yhc16GqJVW6PNl_h1RRQndW5-0Y_j1GxQQnW8GtRrs5wFQhKW3t_1jW49L2tbW1hLfRY8RMjMLW9lRc4K9jfKT5W4Q0Zdm5m6m8kW8LxdC896Hc4HW2VvkFt5Sfdv3VgVkN81J_2NhdRCx_F04" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none" data-hs-link-id="3" data-hs-link-id-v2="3L8jyMgv">Read more</a>]</span></p>
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>

<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">AI guru Ilya Sutskever made the bold claim that most of what you need to know about modern AI is captured in 30 seminal research papers on deep learning.   <div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_177332639688137" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_module" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="module"><div id="hs_cos_wrapper_module_177332639688137_" class="hs_cos_wrapper hs_cos_wrapper_widget hs_cos_wrapper_type_rich_text" style="color: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit;" data-hs-cos-general-type="widget" data-hs-cos-type="rich_text"><div style="font-size:16px; line-height:150%">
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3n8VKLnFl3RNnSFW5LWZ6r4Zyh2_W5qDq1m4MWV5hW3DLj0c4GRvMNW6vLhf12XTK_yW7ClJwz3cYhcVW8GZTpL18thxWW7s1VhR7Lj34WW3mgx6g1VskD0W5Kf7Wm7rfyjfW3qvPYF74f73TW1mr4Fb7TG3dCW3qB-MT97v0-gW3XBjZJ53Jv33W52B_4d3kFrzmW85b6Cc43gyYQW32vC3p8S3sGSW7cFqlG7SHWCHW5_fSxY9gSxrFW2NYS807gnrYrW71ndFH2dknGBW3ZqfGn7Xxh5sW4nVMLH55PWzDVhq3Sw8N-TqdW97ZNCt6lYzMpW3Xd2nR8QrBlTf5MXdX204" target="_blank" style="color:#336699; text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="1" data-hs-link-id-v2="YHakJYtw">Just Use Postgres!</a></span></p>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:13px"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #999999;"><span style="color: #eeeeee;"><span style="color: #cccccc;"><a href="https://d5G9SM04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2Q+113/d5G9SM04/VVxmY2142n2-VTLRKN9lJD3VVGwS3m5LDLgrN2jjSxF3qn9qW7Y8-PT6lZ3pHVgtLCb7T33LLW1zb0Ml4fCDl6VhRCjC6h1q_6W4QMd0h3zsVjNN2Pv98N_Cgb0N44dG1jXt21FW66X5cl7Sw9NbW1k5pyM3LBGY_W3Tc3-h3ZLGvYW7M0gQq8pnltBW4S6zvG7rrHkvW1W0nMf2xbrKlW9cXkd21bgv_DW2xp62Y8K9x65W6N01965L_6NJW4W3wVJ3VQzvvW1vWDwL48rfZ9N5Gp0trl4S-6V9NqXR19pQHcW66smmC44VpfjW1tsslw3bx6NcW5YTqP52d8lXnN1y8HpbXd81BW7ZvMP18qwNqvW79XLbT5JcZcNW65Cdng8S-DX4f6LCdds04" style="text-decoration:none; font-weight:bold; color:#cccccc" rel="noopener" data-hs-link-id="2" data-hs-link-id-v2="oClrBOyk" target="_blank">All the database you need</a></span></span></span></p>
</div>
</div>
<div style="line-height:175%">
<p style="line-height:150%; font-size:4px"> </p>
<p style="line-height:150%"><span style="font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;">You know that PostgreSQL is a fast, reliable, SQL compliant RDBMS. You may not know that it’s also great for geospatial systems, time series, full-text search, JSON documents, AI vector embeddings, and many other specialty database functions. For almost any data task you can imagine, you can use Postgres. This book covers recipes for using Postgres in dozens of applications normally reserved for single-purpose databases. message.subject: Your project chatwoot-crm-platform has been shut down
message.snippet: Project Permanent Deletion Warning Dear Developer, Your Google Cloud project chatwoot-crm-platform was shut down on March 14, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC. Shut-down projects and the data stored in them may be
message.plain_text_body:
Project Permanent Deletion Warning


Dear Developer,

Your Google Cloud project chatwoot-crm-platform was shut down on March 14,  
2026 1:56:47 PM UTC.

Shut-down projects and the data stored in them may be recovered for a  
limited time before the projects are permanently deleted. If you'd like to  
recover your project, you must cancel the project's permanent deletion  
before April 13, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC.

To recover your shut-down project:

Visit the Resources pending deletion page.
Select the project you want to recover, and click Restore.
In the confirmation dialog, click Restore.


If you cannot recover your project by following the instructions above, you  
can try restoring it using the gcloud undelete command.

If you take no action by April 13, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC, you will be unable  
to recover your project.

If you have any questions, please visit Google Cloud Platform Resource  
Manager Documentation or contact Google Cloud Platform Support.

Cordially,
The Google Cloud Platform Team


© 2026 Google LLC. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory email service announcement to update you  
about important changes to your Google project, product or account.
message.html_body:
Project Permanent Deletion Warning

Dear Developer,

Your Google Cloud project chatwoot-crm-platform was shut down on March 14, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC.

Shut-down projects and the data stored in them may be recovered for a limited time before the projects are permanently deleted. If you’d like to recover your project, you must cancel the project’s permanent deletion before April 13, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC.

To recover your shut-down project:

  1. Visit the Resources pending deletion page.
  2. Select the project you want to recover, and click Restore.
  3. In the confirmation dialog, click Restore.

If you cannot recover your project by following the instructions above, you can try restoring it using the gcloud undelete command.

If you take no action by April 13, 2026 1:56:47 PM UTC, you will be unable to recover your project.

If you have any questions, please visit Google Cloud Platform Resource Manager Documentation or contact Google Cloud Platform Support.

Cordially,
The Google Cloud Platform Team

© 2026 Google LLC. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory email service announcement to update you about important changes to your Google project, product or account.

classification.reasoning: This is an automated operational alert from Google Cloud Platform notifying the team about the shutdown and pending deletion of an internal infrastructure project (chatwoot-crm-platform), which requires immediate attention from the operations team.

intent.intent_summary: Google Cloud Platform is sending an automated notification that the project 'chatwoot-crm-platform' has been shut down and is scheduled for permanent deletion.
intent.requested_outcome: To inform the account owner of the shutdown so they can either let the project be permanently deleted or restore it before the deadline of April 13, 2026.
intent.task_description: Review the GCP project shutdown alert for 'chatwoot-crm-platform'. The technical/operations team needs to verify if the shutdown of this CRM project was intentional. If the project and its data are still needed, execute the restoration process via the GCP console or 'gcloud undelete' command before April 13, 2026. If the shutdown was planned, no further action is required.

assessment.rationale: This is a highly clear and actionable operational alert from Google Cloud Platform regarding the shutdown of an internal project. It provides all necessary details to route the issue to the DevOps/operations team, though human input is required to confirm if the shutdown was intentional.
missing_information: Confirmation from the infrastructure/operations team on whether the shutdown was intentional or accidental
